## Summary
The file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py` contains only one occurrence of the terms to be renamed:
- **Line 410**: `"plan_backend": "planned_pr",`
This is an **external API field name** (a workflow input that will be passed to the GitHub workflow system). According to the explicit instruction "DO NOT rename: External API field names", this should **not be changed**.
There are no other occurrences of `plan_backend`, `pr_backend`, `require_plan_backend`, or `require_pr_backend` in this file - neither as imports, parameters, variables, type annotations, nor comments.
